title: Slate CRM Configuration Manager [1-year, Up to $8k]
description:
Why Join Us:
This is a unique opportunity to support the student admissions journey and play a key role in optimising our CRM system for efficiency and impact.

About the Role:
We are seeking an experienced Slate CRM Configuration Manager / Administrator to lead and manage our Technolutions Slate platform, a key system supporting the student admissions journey. The successful candidate will ensure system stability, optimise data integrity, develop reports, and provide technical support across departments.

Key Responsibilities:

  • System Configuration & Management: Maintain and customise the Slate database, design and update application forms, implement validation rules, build automation, and manage portals for applicants and staff.

  • CRM & Technology Support: Assist with CRM and other systems, including configuration, troubleshooting, and implementation.

  • Data Management: Oversee data imports/exports, data cleansing, and integration with campus systems such as SIS and payment gateway.

  • Reporting & Analytics: Develop queries, dashboards, and scheduled reports to provide actionable insights and monitor KPIs.

  • Communications & Events: Manage multi-channel communications, create personalised templates, and coordinate event communications and scheduling.

  • User Support & Strategic Planning: Lead user training, develop documentation, troubleshoot issues, and serve as the primary Technolutions contact.

Qualifications & Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, Business, or related field.

  • Strong knowledge of Slate modules: Applications, Reader, Deliver, Portals, Rules, and Querying.

  • Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and relational databases.

By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec ‘s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

This authorizes us to:

Contact you about potential opportunities.

Delete personal data as it is not required at this application stage.

All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Lua Zhi Chin (Jeanette) - R1873831

ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd – 11C5781

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.
